top.name: Ragnarok
top.rules_text: Deal 7 damage to ALL units for each unique element currently imbued on the board (max 28). Purge all imbued tiles.

channel.name: Ragnarok (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Your units take half damage from this effect

bottom.name: Elemental Convergence
bottom.rules_text: Imbue all tiles within range 3 with random elements. Set all elemental attunement counters to 3.

channel.name: Elemental Convergence (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Set all elemental attunements to 4
